notFound.desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved. Let's get you back on track.
hero.badge: Next.js · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Arabic + English
hero.sub: ORAX is a modern SaaS starter system built for real products, with first-class RTL support, clean architecture, and a bilingual foundation from day one.
hero.stats.rtl.label: RTL + LTR ready
hero.stats.i18n.label: Arabic + English
hero.stats.arch.label: Clean system foundation
hero.stats.editions.label: Free + Pro direction
logos.label: Built with the tools you already love
feat.perf.label: Performance
feat.perf.title: Lighthouse 95+
feat.perf.desc: PPR, optimized fonts, lazy images. Ships fast out of the box.
feat.theme.label: Dark / Light Mode
feat.theme.title: Pixel-perfect in both themes
feat.theme.desc: Full CSS Variables system. localStorage persistence. Smooth transitions.
feat.anim.label: Cinematic Animations
feat.anim.title: GSAP + Framer Motion — scroll-driven storytelling
feat.anim.desc: Page load sequences, ScrollTrigger reveals, custom cursor, particle canvas. Every animation is purposeful.
feat.dx.label: Developer Experience
feat.dx.title: TypeScript strict mode, fully typed
feat.dx.desc: Every component documented. Biome for linting. Zero guesswork.
feat.tokens.label: Design Tokens
feat.tokens.title: Brand it in 30 seconds
feat.tokens.desc: Change your brand color once in globals.css and the entire template updates.
how.label: 05 — Process
how.heading: From install to
how.sub: No complex setup. No server configurations. Just clone, fill your .env, and deploy.
how.s1.title: Clone and install with pnpm
how.s1.after: inside the project. TypeScript, Tailwind v4, Biome, shadcn/ui — all pre-configured.
how.s2.title: Fill in your .env.local
how.s2.after: and add your API keys. Every variable is documented.
how.s3.title: Brand it in 30 seconds
how.s3.after: and everything updates. RTL flips with one attribute.
how.s4.title: Push to Vercel, go live
how.s4.after: or connect your GitHub repo. Live in under 2 minutes.
testi.label: 06 — Testimonials
testi.heading: What builders are
editions.label: 03 — Editions
editions.heading: Choose the right
editions.sub: ORAX is now structured into two clear editions: a polished free UI system and a real Pro SaaS foundation.
editions.free.name: ORAX Free
editions.free.desc: A complete free interface system to explore the ORAX approach, design language, RTL support, and product structure.
editions.free.note: Best for evaluation, inspiration, and audience building.
editions.pro.name: ORAX Pro
editions.pro.desc: The real SaaS foundation with authentication, protected routes, backend structure, and scalable architecture for actual products.
editions.pro.note: Built for serious SaaS products and long-term system growth.
features.label: 02 — System Capabilities
features.heading: Built as a system.
feat.rtl.label: RTL Foundation
feat.rtl.title: Arabic and RTL are built in from the start
feat.rtl.desc: ORAX is not retrofitted for Arabic. Direction, spacing, typography, and layout behavior are treated as part of the system.
feat.structure.label: Clean Structure
feat.structure.title: Clear separation between UI, system, and future app logic
feat.structure.desc: The project is shaped to avoid mixing landing concerns with future SaaS logic, making the codebase easier to grow.
feat.free.label: Free Edition
feat.free.title: A polished free version that still feels complete
feat.free.desc: ORAX Free is designed to build trust through real UI quality, not through fake backend promises.
feat.pro.label: Pro Direction
feat.pro.title: A real path toward a production SaaS system
feat.pro.desc: ORAX Pro is positioned as the technical foundation for real authentication, protected routes, APIs, and scalable product architecture.
feat.design.label: Design System
feat.design.title: A consistent interface language across the product
feat.design.desc: Shared tokens, reusable patterns, and visual consistency make the UI easier to maintain and extend.
feat.positioning.label: Product Thinking
feat.positioning.title: Built for serious SaaS builders targeting Arabic users
feat.positioning.desc: ORAX is intentionally shaped for developers who need bilingual product credibility, not another generic starter.
cta.label: — Ready?
cta.sub: Your next project is 5 minutes from being live. Every hour on boilerplate is an hour not spent on what matters.
cta.note: One-time payment · Lifetime updates · RTL included · 7-day guarantee
footer.tagline: The SaaS starter kit that converts. Built with Next.js 16 and first-class RTL support.
footer.author: Omar
